_comment: M9 DoD anchor — German VFR inbound to EDNY (Friedrichshafen) via VRP 'Sierra'. The pilot identifies the VRP with the German position marker 'ueber' (NfL Sprechfunk 2024 standard form), which triggers intent_parser to switch INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND -> INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP. Tower responds with the German VRP-clearance template ('frei zum Einflug in die Kontrollzone ueber Sierra, Piste 24, melden Sie im Gegenanflug').
name: DE VRP inbound — EDNY Friedrichshafen via Sierra

say.note: Step 1 — Pilot calls Turm from VRP Sierra inbound for landing. The 'turm' facility keyword routes to INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND (REQUEST_LANDING is vetoed by its has_facility guard), and 'zur Landung' carries the inbound intent. Marker 'ueber' tells the VRP parser to look at the next word; 'sierra' matches the registered EDNY VRP and the intent is upgraded to INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.
say.text: Friedrichshafen Turm, Delta Echo Whiskey Lima Yankee, ueber Sierra, zur Landung
